title: Jupiter Hospital is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Jupiter Hospital is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Jupiter Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Coimbatore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Jupiter Hospital:
Jupiter Hospital is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jupiter Hospital!
